title: Void-Crystal 16x
body:
Void Crystal - Resource Pack

Optimized for Crystal PvP with a dark visual style, knife swords for better overview, and custom sounds and particles for cleaner combat feedback.

This resource pack is built for Crystal PvP players who want a competitive advantage through cleaner visuals and a consistent dark aesthetic. Every modified element is designed to reduce visual clutter during fights and improve overall clarity.

Changes included:

- Fire is reduced in size both on the ground and during ignition, keeping your screen clear during crystal explosions
- All swords are retextured as knives, providing a wider field of view in PvP situations
- Netherite armor is darker and more subdued: diamond armor includes border outlines for quick identification
- Ender crystals are retextured in a void style to match the dark theme of the pack
- All ores feature high-contrast borders for easier visibility while mining
- Sounds have been replaced for eating, drinking, explosions, and hit detection
- Hit, damage, and enchanted hit particles are replaced with sculk soul particles for cleaner combat visuals
- Includes selected fixes and enhancements from Vanilla Tweaks (vanillatweaks.net)
